Overview of PLC 2
• This is about the Transformation – or the What
• There’s generally more teaching in PLC 2
• You want to dig deep in teaching
The Framework of PLC 2
• Thanks and recap
• Not everyone saw your PLC 1
• Thanking them for comments builds social
proof
• Think about how TV shows in a series recap
what happened in the last series
• Recap the opportunity
The Framework of PLC 2
• Recap your positioning
• Present a case study and do some real teaching
• Objection Crushing
• Foreshadow PLC 3
• Call to action (CTA)

Example Script for PLC 2
• Thanks for all the comments…
• In the last video I showed you…
• And how I discovered the answer…
• And what’s possible…
• Now I want to take you deeper in this area…
Example Script for PLC 2
• A lot of people have been asking about this…
• In the next video…
• Scroll down and leave a comment for me…
Tips for powerful content…
• Video length: Try to keep it to 12-18 minutes
• Make it only as long as it needs to be
• Cut it down when possible
• Always make it as short as you possibly can

Tips for powerful content…
• Use full motion video (direct to camera) when
possible
• Screen capture is harder to create a connection
• The most important think is that you’re
comfortable
• Link your previous Prelaunch Content on your
PLC 2 pages
• Add a PDF or worksheet download to your
Prelaunch Content pages
Download the PLC 2 Planner (and
checklist)
